post.description:
Transcribes audio into the input language.

Compatible with the OpenAI `audio.transcriptions.create` SDK method.

**Word timestamps:** use `timestamp_granularities=word` (OpenAI SDK style) or
`word_timestamps=true` (direct call). Requires `response_format=verbose_json`.

Translates audio into English.

Compatible with the OpenAI `audio.translations.create` SDK method.
Language is always auto-detected; word timestamps are not supported for translation.

file.title: File
file.description: Audio file to transcribe (mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, wav, webm).

response_format.title: Response Format
response_format.description: Output format. `json` returns `{text}`. `verbose_json` returns segments and word timestamps. `text`, `srt`, `vtt` return plain text.

language.title: Language
language.description: ISO-639-1 language code (e.g. `fr`, `en`). If omitted, the language is auto-detected.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Text to guide the model's style or provide context (e.g. unusual proper nouns, acronyms). Does not constrain the output.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: Sampling temperature. Send a single value (`0.2`) for fixed temperature, or repeat the field multiple times for a fallback schedule (tries each value if the previous attempt fails quality checks).

timestamp_granularities.title: Timestamp Granularities
timestamp_granularities.description: Granularity of timestamps in the response. Accepted values: `segment` (default), `word`. Requires `response_format=verbose_json`. OpenAI SDK compatible — also maps to `word_timestamps` internally. Note: the OpenAI SDK sends this field as `timestamp_granularities[]=word`; if using the SDK, prefer setting `word_timestamps=true` directly.

debug.title: Debug
debug.description: If true, includes the effective faster-whisper parameters in the response under the `parameters` key (only for `json` and `verbose_json` formats).

prefix.title: Prefix
prefix.description: Text prefix inserted before the first transcribed segment. Influences the style of the output without appearing in the context window for subsequent segments.

beam_size.title: Beam Size
beam_size.description: Number of beams in beam search. Higher values improve quality at the cost of speed. Set to `1` for greedy decoding.

best_of.title: Best Of
best_of.description: Number of candidates to sample when `temperature > 0`. The candidate with the highest log-probability is returned.

patience.title: Patience
patience.description: Beam search patience factor. Values > 1.0 allow the search to continue even after finding `beam_size` complete hypotheses, potentially improving quality.

length_penalty.title: Length Penalty
length_penalty.description: Exponential length penalty applied to beam scores. Values > 1.0 favor longer outputs; < 1.0 favor shorter ones.

repetition_penalty.title: Repetition Penalty
repetition_penalty.description: Penalty multiplier applied to already-generated tokens. Values > 1.0 reduce repetition.

no_repeat_ngram_size.title: No Repeat Ngram Size
no_repeat_ngram_size.description: Prevents repeating any n-gram of this size. `0` disables the constraint.

condition_on_previous_text.title: Condition On Previous Text
condition_on_previous_text.description: If true, feeds the previous segment's output as context for the next. Improves coherence but can propagate errors. Disable for independent segment decoding.

prompt_reset_on_temperature.title: Prompt Reset On Temperature
prompt_reset_on_temperature.description: When the fallback temperature reaches this value, the initial prompt context is reset. Helps break repetition loops introduced by a bad prompt.

compression_ratio_threshold.title: Compression Ratio Threshold
compression_ratio_threshold.description: If the gzip compression ratio of a segment exceeds this value, the segment is considered a hallucination and retried with a higher temperature.

log_prob_threshold.title: Log Prob Threshold
log_prob_threshold.description: If the average log-probability of a segment is below this threshold, the segment is retried. Lower (more negative) values are more permissive.

no_speech_threshold.title: No Speech Threshold
no_speech_threshold.description: If the no-speech probability of a segment exceeds this value and the log-prob threshold is also triggered, the segment is treated as silence.

suppress_blank.title: Suppress Blank
suppress_blank.description: Suppress blank outputs at the beginning of sampling.

suppress_tokens.title: Suppress Tokens
suppress_tokens.description: Token IDs to suppress during decoding. `-1` suppresses all special tokens except for special language/task tokens. Repeat the field for multiple IDs.

without_timestamps.title: Without Timestamps
without_timestamps.description: If true, the model is forced to predict text only (no timestamp tokens). Faster but segments won't have start/end times.

max_initial_timestamp.title: Max Initial Timestamp
max_initial_timestamp.description: Maximum timestamp for the first segment. Prevents the model from starting arbitrarily late in the audio.

word_timestamps.title: Word Timestamps
word_timestamps.description: Enable word-level timestamps. Returned under `words` in each segment (requires `response_format=verbose_json`). Also activated by `timestamp_granularities=word`.

prepend_punctuations.title: Prepend Punctuations
prepend_punctuations.description: Punctuation characters that are merged with the following word (no space inserted before them).

append_punctuations.title: Append Punctuations
append_punctuations.description: Punctuation characters that are merged with the preceding word (no space inserted after them).

multilingual.title: Multilingual
multilingual.description: Allow the model to switch languages mid-transcription (multilingual models only).

vad_filter.title: Vad Filter
vad_filter.description: Apply Voice Activity Detection to filter out silent parts before transcription. Reduces hallucinations on silent audio.

vad_parameters.title: Vad Parameters
vad_parameters.description: VAD tuning as a JSON object. Defaults to `{"min_silence_duration_ms": 500}`. Example: `{"min_silence_duration_ms": 300, "threshold": 0.6}`.

max_new_tokens.title: Max New Tokens
max_new_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate per audio chunk. Limits output length; `None` means no limit.

chunk_length.title: Chunk Length
chunk_length.description: Audio chunk duration in seconds for batched processing. `None` uses the model's default (30s for Whisper).

clip_timestamps.title: Clip Timestamps
clip_timestamps.description: Timestamps (seconds) delimiting the audio region(s) to transcribe. A single value sets the start offset. Pairs of values define [start, end] windows. Repeat the field for multiple values.

hallucination_silence_threshold.title: Hallucination Silence Threshold
hallucination_silence_threshold.description: When word timestamps are enabled, segments where the ratio of silent words exceeds this threshold are considered hallucinations and discarded.

hotwords.title: Hotwords
hotwords.description: Comma-separated list of words to boost during decoding (increases their probability). Useful for domain-specific vocabulary.

language_detection_threshold.title: Language Detection Threshold
language_detection_threshold.description: Minimum confidence score for automatic language detection. If the detected language scores below this value, the detection may fall back.

language_detection_segments.title: Language Detection Segments
language_detection_segments.description: Number of initial audio segments used for language detection. More segments improve accuracy at the cost of latency.

file.title: File
file.description: Audio file to translate (mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, wav, webm).

debug.title: Debug
debug.description: If true, includes effective faster-whisper parameters in the response under `parameters`.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Text to guide the model's style or provide context for the English output.

prefix.title: Prefix
prefix.description: Text prefix inserted before the first translated segment. Influences the English output style.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: Sampling temperature(s). Send a single value (`0.2`) for fixed temperature, or repeat the field for a fallback schedule.

beam_size.title: Beam Size
beam_size.description: Beam search width. Higher values improve quality at the cost of speed. `1` = greedy decoding.

best_of.title: Best Of
best_of.description: Number of candidates sampled when `temperature > 0`. The best by log-probability is returned.

patience.title: Patience
patience.description: Beam search patience factor. Values > 1.0 allow more exploration, potentially improving quality.

length_penalty.title: Length Penalty
length_penalty.description: Exponential length penalty on beam scores. Values > 1.0 favor longer outputs.

repetition_penalty.title: Repetition Penalty
repetition_penalty.description: Penalty applied to already-generated tokens. Values > 1.0 reduce repetition.

no_repeat_ngram_size.title: No Repeat Ngram Size
no_repeat_ngram_size.description: Prevents repeating any n-gram of this size. `0` = disabled.

condition_on_previous_text.title: Condition On Previous Text
condition_on_previous_text.description: Feed the previous segment's output as context for the next. Improves coherence but can propagate errors.

prompt_reset_on_temperature.title: Prompt Reset On Temperature
prompt_reset_on_temperature.description: When the fallback temperature reaches this value, the prompt context is reset to break repetition loops.

compression_ratio_threshold.title: Compression Ratio Threshold
compression_ratio_threshold.description: If a segment's gzip compression ratio exceeds this value, it is considered a hallucination and retried.

log_prob_threshold.title: Log Prob Threshold
log_prob_threshold.description: If the average log-probability of a segment is below this threshold, the segment is retried. Lower = more permissive.

no_speech_threshold.title: No Speech Threshold
no_speech_threshold.description: If the no-speech probability exceeds this value and the log-prob threshold triggers, the segment is treated as silence.

suppress_blank.title: Suppress Blank
suppress_blank.description: Suppress blank outputs at the beginning of sampling.

suppress_tokens.title: Suppress Tokens
suppress_tokens.description: Token IDs to suppress during decoding. Repeat the field for multiple IDs.

without_timestamps.title: Without Timestamps
without_timestamps.description: Force text-only prediction (no timestamp tokens). Default `true` for translation.

max_initial_timestamp.title: Max Initial Timestamp
max_initial_timestamp.description: Maximum timestamp for the first segment. Prevents starting arbitrarily late in the audio.

prepend_punctuations.title: Prepend Punctuations
prepend_punctuations.description: Punctuation characters merged with the following word (no space inserted before them).

append_punctuations.title: Append Punctuations
append_punctuations.description: Punctuation characters merged with the preceding word (no space inserted after them).

multilingual.title: Multilingual
multilingual.description: Allow language switching mid-audio (multilingual models only).

vad_filter.title: Vad Filter
vad_filter.description: Apply Voice Activity Detection to filter silence before translation. Enabled by default to reduce hallucinations on quiet segments.

vad_parameters.title: Vad Parameters
vad_parameters.description: VAD tuning as a JSON object. Defaults to `{"min_silence_duration_ms": 500}`. Example: `{"min_silence_duration_ms": 300, "threshold": 0.6}`.

max_new_tokens.title: Max New Tokens
max_new_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate per audio chunk. `None` = no limit.

chunk_length.title: Chunk Length
chunk_length.description: Audio chunk duration in seconds for batched processing. `None` uses the model default (30s).

clip_timestamps.title: Clip Timestamps
clip_timestamps.description: Timestamps (seconds) delimiting the audio region(s) to translate. Single value = start offset. Pairs = [start, end]. Repeat for multiple values.

hallucination_silence_threshold.title: Hallucination Silence Threshold
hallucination_silence_threshold.description: Discard segments where the ratio of silent words exceeds this threshold (requires word timestamps internally).

hotwords.title: Hotwords
hotwords.description: Comma-separated words to boost during decoding. Useful for domain-specific vocabulary.

language_detection_threshold.title: Language Detection Threshold
language_detection_threshold.description: Minimum confidence for automatic language detection before translation.

language_detection_segments.title: Language Detection Segments
language_detection_segments.description: Number of initial audio segments used for language detection. More segments = better accuracy, higher latency.
